title: Disney (DIS)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on The Walt Disney Company. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Disney is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Disney's FCF has been lumpy due to heavy streaming and parks investments. As direct-to-consumer (Disney+, Hulu) reaches steady profitability and park investments stabilize, cash flow margins should expand. 8% assumes solid bottom-line improvement rather than massive top-line acceleration.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Disney's FCF has been lumpy due to heavy streaming and parks investments. As direct-to-consumer (Disney+, Hulu) reaches steady profitability and park investments stabilize, cash flow margins should expand. 8% assumes solid bottom-line improvement rather than massive top-line acceleration.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
Disney's FCF has been lumpy due to heavy streaming and parks investments. As direct-to-consumer (Disney+, Hulu) reaches steady profitability and park investments stabilize, cash flow margins should expand. 8% assumes solid bottom-line improvement rather than massive top-line acceleration.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use DCF for Disney?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "Disney (DIS) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 18, 2026.
